text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During lunch, I notice Satono Diamond and
Kitasan Black having a serious conversation.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if the tea party idea was a little too
formal? Maybe we should've gone with something
more casual.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Do you think so? What kind of casual gathering
do you think the maintenance staff would enjoy?
choice_data_list:
Is this about the thing you were discussing the
other day?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Trainer! What perfect timing!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. You see, we tried inviting all the staff to
join us for a tea party, but...

text_block_list.name: Track Maintenance Staff
text_block_list.text:
A thank-you tea party? Aw, I'm touched, but you
don't have to do anything like that for me!

text_block_list.name: Track Maintenance Staff
text_block_list.text:
Maintaining the track is my job. So long as you all
can run free of concern, that's more than enough
for me!

text_block_list.name: Dorm Housemother
text_block_list.text:
Instead of worrying about us, just make sure to
eat and sleep properly so you can stay healthy!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: They all turned us down...
choice_data_list: So you're thinking of an alternative idea now?
So you're thinking of an alternative idea now?

text_block_list.text: Oh! There you are, Satono!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: What? This is from McQueen?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
She said it was a thank-you gift! She's out on a
trip, so she asked me to give it to you instead.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
She was really happy when you cheered her on! It
gave her the extra boost she needed!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Really? I'm glad to hear it!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I'm glad, but...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Well... I feel happy, but at the same time, I feel
kind of guilty too.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I cheered for her because I wanted to. That's
hardly deserving of a gift.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: She really didn't have to go out of her way to—

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Track Maintenance Staff
text_block_list.text:
A thank-you tea party? Aw, I'm touched, but you
don't have to do anything like that for me!

text_block_list.name: Dorm Housemother
text_block_list.text:
Instead of worrying about us, just make sure to
eat and sleep properly so you can stay healthy!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Could it be the staff felt the same way?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I see now. They aren't supporting us because
they want compensation.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
They do so because they wish for us to fulfill our
dreams.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...So words and gifts aren't the right way to show
our gratitude.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
There's only one thing we can do to make the
staff's wish come true...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: The staff's wish?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um, sorry, could you fill me in on what you're
talking about?
choice_data_list: I want to help out too!
I want to help out too!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe. All right, then. Lend me your ears!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Understood! I'll help prepare everything and let
everyone know, then. ♪

text_block_list.name: Dia and Kitasan
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: And that's why we'd love to have your help!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Gotcha. Well, count me in!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
We'll have to give our all to make this an event to
remember! Let's pour our very hearts and souls
into this!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Excuse us! We couldn't help overhearing, but
well... Is there anything we can do to help?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Satono Diamond's plan is put into
motion!
